summary: First iteration end-to-end test for MediLink PHR MVP. Backend: 16/16 pytest cases passed (health, idempotent seed, auth for all 3 roles, registration, NFC scan valid/invalid, doctor list, appointment booking, mock payment, doctor-scoped appointment listing, medical record creation, simulated cloud sync after ~6s, AI summary, AI drug check, AI symptom-check SSE stream with [DONE] terminator, and role authorization 403s). Frontend: landing CTAs render, demo-login buttons route to /patient, /doctor, /reception correctly; patient dashboard shows queue #001; doctor NFC dialog loads patient by IC, AI Summary renders 557 chars, AI Drug Check renders 1025 chars; reception dashboard shows Now Serving counter and Trigger sync toast works. No blocking issues found.

minor.issue: Endpoint requires auth but is consumed by SyncIndicator component that may be mounted before login on some screens; acceptable since AppShell only renders it post-auth
Always assigns role='patient' regardless of body.role when role is missing; auto-generated IC uses 8 hex chars (no Malaysian IC format) - fine for demo but worth noting

issues: When test creates appointment for tomorrow, today's queue shows 'No appointments today' which is correct but Now Serving stays 0 - cosmetic only

critical_code_review_comments: server.py is a single ~690 line file - consider splitting into routers (auth, appointments, records, ai, sync) before further feature growth.
AI endpoints catch generic Exception and surface raw error string in HTTP 500 - in production this could leak details; acceptable for demo.

_sync_to_cloud uses asyncio.create_task without persistence; tasks will be lost on backend restart leaving records stuck in 'local'/'syncing'. Consider a startup reconciliation job that re-triggers any pending records.
/api/auth/register does not enforce password strength or rate-limit; fine for demo.
DoctorDashboard - AI summary button is only visible after a patient is selected; this is expected but worth noting for testers.
test_credentials: Seeded accounts confirmed working: admin@medilink.io/Admin@123, dr.tan@medilink.io/Doctor@123, dr.kaur@medilink.io/Doctor@123, patient1@medilink.io/Patient@123 (IC IC-880421-14-5567), patient2/patient3 similarly.
seed_data_creation: POST /api/seed is idempotent. Test run created 1 TEST_ user via /api/auth/register and 1 TEST_ appointment + 1 TEST_ medical record; volume is small and harmless.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Pytest suite at /app/backend/tests/test_medilink.py covers all backend endpoints in 16 cases (~21s incl. 6s sync wait and 3 Gemini calls). Frontend playwright flow: login -> demo buttons -> dashboards -> doctor NFC IC-880421-14-5567 -> AI summary (data-testid='ai-summary-output') -> new record dialog -> AI drug check (data-testid='ai-drug-output'). The simulated cloud sync takes ~4.5s after record creation (2.5s local -> syncing, then 2s -> cloud). The AI symptom-check is SSE streaming and ends with 'data: [DONE]'.
rca of the issue: N/A - no bugs to RCA. MVP works end-to-end.
